2023-24 Dayton Flyers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 25-8 (14-4, 3rd in A-10 MBB)

Rank: 25th in the Final AP Poll

Coach: Anthony Grant

PS/G: 74.2 (154th of 362)

PA/G: 66.5 (31st of 362)

SRS: 13.45 (41st of 362)

SOS: 5.73 (85th of 362)

ORtg: 114.1 (28th of 362)

DRtg: 102.2 (132nd of 362)

NCAA Tournament: (#7 seed in West)
Won West First Round (63-60) versus #10 Nevada
Lost West Second Round (78-68) versus #2 Arizona
